description: You are the on-call SRE responding to issues with three production containers during a traffic spike. Resolve the following issues without restarting the containers to maintain 100% uptime: update 'acme-web' to have at least 1GB memory and 2.0 CPUs, connect 'acme-db' to the 'admin-net' network, and reload the 'acme-lb' configuration using the updated file at /etc/nginx/nginx.conf.
